allow: Bash(git commit -m 'docs: Update README files for v1.0.6 - Replace screenshots with text descriptions *)
Bash(git commit -m 'docs: Add v1.0.6 changelog and file update documentation *)
Bash(git merge master -m 'Merge v1.0.6 updates from master to main *)
Bash(git merge master --allow-unrelated-histories -m 'Merge v1.0.6 updates from master to main *)
Bash(git commit -m 'docs: Update README files for v1.0.6 on main branch *)
Bash(git commit -m 'feat: Optimize app.py startup flow and splash screen *)
Bash(git commit -m 'feat: Add accessibility_utils.py - WCAG 2.1 compliance verification *)
Bash(git commit -m 'feat: Add quick_improvements.py - UI enhancement toolkit *)
